actions.scope: block package publishing until metadata and token posture are reviewed
rotate the publish credential reference without recording the value

valid_dry_runs.recovery_route: verify replacement credential scope, run publish dry-run, then require human re-enable
validation_steps: confirm old credential reference is disabled
confirm replacement credential has least-privilege scope
valid_dry_runs.post_restore_monitoring: watch release workflow and package registry for one release window
valid_dry_runs.residual_risk: package ecosystem propagation may lag after credential rotation

actions.scope: disable write capability for the affected agent identity

valid_dry_runs.recovery_route: reissue scoped credential after identity validation and bus receipt review
validation_steps: confirm affected agent can no longer write
confirm new credential is scoped to required repositories only
valid_dry_runs.post_restore_monitoring: monitor bus and repository writes for one incident window
valid_dry_runs.residual_risk: stale local sessions may need explicit termination outside this receipt

actions.scope: revoke the repository token reference and preserve branch protections

valid_dry_runs.recovery_route: restore least-privilege GitHub app or token grant after checks pass
validation_steps: confirm CI can run with replacement grant
valid_dry_runs.post_restore_monitoring: watch workflow and branch-protection audit logs
valid_dry_runs.residual_risk: automation depending on the revoked token may need explicit reroute

actions.scope: pause connector writes until data boundary review completes

valid_dry_runs.recovery_route: reconnect with scoped grant and validate no private data leakage
validation_steps: confirm read-only access remains within approved scope
confirm reconnected grant excludes sensitive surfaces
valid_dry_runs.post_restore_monitoring: monitor connector write receipts for one review window
valid_dry_runs.residual_risk: third-party connector audit logs may be delayed

rejected_dry_runs.reason: scope targets all assets without bounded authority or staged recovery
revocation is proposed without a restoration route
automation attempts to re-enable a sensitive surface without human approval
receipt includes a credential value instead of an asset reference
